LANGUAGE.TITLE: Site language
LANGUAGE.SUBTITLE: Choose the language used in the interface and the automatic messages the site displays.
LANGUAGE.LABEL: Current language
LANGUAGE.HELPER: The selected language applies immediately while navigating the app.

THEME.TITLE: Theme
THEME.SUBTITLE: Set the site to use light, dark, or follow your system preference.
THEME.LABEL: Current mode
THEME.HELPER: Detected on the system: {{mode}}. This choice only affects the control panel appearance.

LOGOUT_CURRENT.ERROR: Unable to log out of the current session.
LOGOUT_CURRENT.LOADING: Logging out of the current session...

LOGOUT_ALL.ERROR: Unable to log out all sessions.
